title: pelargonium urbanum
intro: Pelargonium urbanum, also known as Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium urbanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit potential antiviral properties, making it a popular herbal remedy. Pelargonium urbanum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in the production of herbal supplements and essential oils.
